movie.actors: Jeremy Sumpter, Lyndsy Fonseca, John Robinson, Jake Scott
movie.plot: A high school kid (Sumpter) develops an addiction to Internet porn so intense that it begins to destroy his life and tear his family apart.
movie.title: Cyber Seduction: His Secret Life
movie.writer: Wesley Bishop (teleplay), Richard Kletter (teleplay), Wesley Bishop (story)
